title: hieracium brevifolium subsp. malyi-caroli
intro: Hieracium brevifolium subsp. malyi-caroli, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium brevifolium subsp. malyi-caroli include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
